/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/program_main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/program_main.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/program_main.dir/src/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/program_main.dir/src/Character.cpp.o -o program_main  /app/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libglfw3.a /app/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libglad.a /app/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libimguid.a /app/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libglm.a /app/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
